title: Default namespace lacks PSA enforce label (G11 confirmed)
expected: Workspace namespace SHOULD have pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: restricted
notes: Without `pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: restricted`, k8s admission permits privileged/hostPath/SYS_ADMIN pods if RBAC permits creating pods. Defence-in-depth gap. Add `enforce: restricted` and `audit: restricted` to the namespace template.
